mdSummary:
# Sparkline

Inline SVG trend chart primitive — line, area, or bars for tables and KPI strips.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Status & Indicators
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sparkline

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sparkline | Values | `IEnumerable<double>?` | `` |  |
| Sparkline | Height | `int` | `32` |  |
| Sparkline | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sparkline | Type | `SparkType` | `SparkType.Line` |  |
| Sparkline | ShowArea | `bool` | `` |  |
| Sparkline | ShowLast | `bool` | `` |  |
| Sparkline | StrokeWidth | `double` | `1.5` |  |
| Sparkline | AriaLabel | `string?` | `"Trend"` |  |
| Sparkline | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sparkline | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
